Germany.title: Germany
Germany.summary: Example entry for Germany. Replace or expand this text with your project findings.
Germany.gridConnectionProcedure: Grid connection procedures are shaped by national energy law, technical network codes and the requirements of the responsible network operator. Add your detailed analysis here.
regulatoryFramework: Technical connection rules of the relevant grid operator
responsibleInstitutions: Transmission system operators: 50Hertz, Amprion, TenneT, TransnetBW
implementationExamples: Connection requests for renewable generation projects are processed by the relevant network operator.
Grid expansion planning is coordinated through national network development planning.

Portugal.title: Portugal
Portugal.summary: Example entry for Portugal. Replace or expand this text with your project findings.
Portugal.gridConnectionProcedure: Grid connection is influenced by Portuguese energy regulation, network operator requirements and licensing procedures. Add your detailed analysis here.
responsibleInstitutions: DGEG – Directorate-General for Energy and Geology
implementationExamples: Renewable energy projects require technical assessment and connection capacity evaluation.
Network access procedures are linked to regulatory and licensing requirements.
